meaning: n.淫荡的人adj.放纵的,淫荡的
examples: Cyprian, for example, talks of exhibitions of shame and modesty.
A full English style flake with a healthy dose of Cyprian Latakia.
Cyprian in some places testifies that the blood was given to the people.
The Cyprian banking system, like all banking systems today, is a fractional reserve system.
Cyprian depositors are currently lining up at ATM machines to redeem what is rightfully their money.
